case_title: KELSY BEATTY VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BEATTY, KELSY AS TO DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC. AV-LIL INVESTMENTS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF KELSY BEATTY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY EDWARD SAVINO, RESTAURANT OWNER. DEFENDANT AV-LIL INVESTMENTS, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARK BUDAK, MANANGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-01-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AV-LIL INVESTMENTS LLC

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. SATISFACTION FO JUDGMENT FILEED AUG-29-17. NO APPEARANCES BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OR JUDGMENT DEBTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEATTY, KELSY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC. $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,105.00, PLAINTIFFS CLAIMS AGAINST AV-LIL INVESTMENTS, LLC AND MARK BUDAK ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - LIVERPOOL LIL'S, INC.;(ENVELOPE MARKED:FORWARD TIME EXP - RETURNED TO SENDER)
